expectations.text: Addresses all three requested components: GTM angle, launch email, and what to measure
expectations.evidence: Three labeled sections: GTM angle, launch email, first-30-days measurement.

expectations.text: Delivers an actual launch email (subject + body + CTA), not just a description
expectations.evidence: Full email with subject, preview, body, and 'Find my tutor' CTA.

expectations.text: The measurement portion warns against vanity metrics and notes attribution is imperfect
expectations.evidence: Warns against vanity counts (waitlist size/page views) and states attribution is directional in a two-sided launch.

expectations.text: Maintains one consistent core message across the three components
expectations.evidence: 'Vetted, nearby, booked this week' carries through angle, email, and the activation metric.

expectations.text: States load-bearing assumptions in one line and does not balloon into an unfocused wall of text
expectations.evidence: One assumptions line; tight three-part structure.

expectations.text: Accounts for the two-sided nature (tutors and parents)
expectations.evidence: Addresses both sides: liquidity strategy, a tutor-side email variant, and supply-health metrics.
